2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds userfaultfd (UFFD) read-write-protect (RWP) tests to the Linux kernel selftest suite. The tests cover various scenarios, including asynchronous and synchronous RWP modes, page mapping, memory protection, and fork handling. The tests verify that UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT work correctly in different situations. The patch includes 11 test cases that run against anonymous, shared memory, and hugetlb memory types.
